channel.title: Lexicographica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Lexicographica

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0001

item.title: Glancing back, looking forward: the Swedish Academy Dictionary completed after 130 years – now time for revision
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0002

item.title: Sorry, shit and wow: a case study of the handling of interjections in three Nordic monolingual dictionaries
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0003

item.title: Derivatives in Swedish dictionaries. The case of deverbal nouns in -ande
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0004

item.title: Aligning grammatical information in linguistic resources published by the same authority. The case of participles in Swedish Academy dictionaries and grammar
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0005

item.title: Danish Lexicography between Tradition and Innovation: Digital Dictionaries and Needs-adapted Glosses
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0006

item.title: Ten good reasons to build the Norwegian ConstructiCon, a dictionary of grammar
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0007

item.title: High and low level constructions in dictionaries and constructiCons: the interplay between lexical and syntactic information in CASA|Con
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0008

item.title: Despite Current Challenges: Lexicography has a bright future
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0009

item.title: Vocabularius incipiens teutonicum ante latinum. Konzeption und Geschichte eines deutsch-lateinischen Vokabulars des Spätmittelalters
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0010

item.title: Im Netz der Wörter
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0011

item.title: Lexicographical Resources for Mountaineers: A Usage Survey
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0012

item.title: EMLex 2024
item.description: Article by Ulrich Heid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lex-2024-0013
